templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: At this time L'ange does not offer exchanges, however, we will gladly accept your returned styling tool within 60 days from the date of shipping. Please note that there is a flat fee of $8.50 for the return label. You can start your return here: https://langehair.attn.tv/aBkGzET45xAY

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content:
We have a rewards and a referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here:
Reward program: https://langehair.com/pages/rewards
Referral program: https://langehair.com/pages/refer-a-friend

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://langehair.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/langehair/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/getlange/

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3 - 5 business days. Once shipped it will take 3-10 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://langehair.com/pages/refund-policy#:~:text=LIMITED%20WARRANTY,damaged/defective%20product.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are made in the United States

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://langehair.com/pages/refund-policy?srsltid=AfmBOopRJHemr9so_xA5YdOOwqGTXYHO03VHcJ5lowEeBFm3StDoJrxN

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: How to redeem points
templates.content: You can easily redeem your rewards points at checkout. While checking out, you will be presented with your points balance and prompted to select how many points you want to use for your purchase. Remember, you'll need at least 500 points to redeem, and you can enjoy discounts towards your purchase depending on your points balance. Hope this helps!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customercare@langehair.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customercare@langehair.com. Our team is happy to help!
